sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n72890" key="o)laimeu/s" type="gloss" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὀλαιμεύς·</orth> <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen> (<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">τὸ</foreign> cod.) <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">τὰς ὀλὰς βάλλων,</foreign> Id. <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὀλαιτοί·</orth> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">σπερμολόγοι, καὶ</foreign> </entryFree>
